concerns.text: FR-005 (Wilcoxon test) and FR-004 (Nested CV) require valid error pairs from a held-out test set. Task T014.5 (extract test set predictions) and T015 (calculate MAE/RMSE on test set) are marked incomplete. Without these, the statistical comparison in T021 cannot execute on the correct data split, leaving FR-005 unimplemented.

FR-005 requires a visual comparison of Baseline vs. RF performance. Task T022 (generate model_comparison.png) is marked incomplete. Additionally, T020.1 (final model evaluation on held-out test set) is incomplete, meaning the RF predictions required for the Wilcoxon test in T021 are missing.

FR-007 (map SHAP bits to substructures) and Constitution Principle VI (Non-Additivity Interaction Mapping) require specific artifacts. T029 (map bits to substructures) and T027 (generate shap_interactions.png) are incomplete. T030.1 (Create Rules File) is also incomplete, breaking the dependency chain for T030 and preventing the identification of 'interaction zones'.

Constitution Principle I (Reproducibility) requires pinned dependencies and verified tooling. Task T003 (Configure linting/formatting) is incomplete, and the plan explicitly requires `pyproject.toml` and `.ruff.toml` which are not yet generated by a task.

The Plan's 'Resolving Unresolved Panel Concerns' and Constitution Principle III (Data Hygiene) require explicit validation of measurement standards and data provenance. Tasks T050 (Measurement Standards Audit), T051 (Conformational Ensemble Proxy Report), and T052 (Source Verification Hash) are incomplete, leaving critical validation protocols unimplemented.

Task T011.5 (Split dataset) is marked incomplete, yet it is a hard dependency for T014, T019, T020, and T021. The task description exists but the status flag indicates it is not ready, creating a logical block for the entire pipeline execution.
